description: Search Seats.aero award-flight availability, route coverage, mileage-program feeds, and trip details from the terminal.

novel_features.name: Award deal finder
novel_features.description: Find bookable award seats between airports with cabin, direct-flight, carrier, date, and lowest-mileage filters in one agent-safe command.

novel_features.name: Program route atlas
novel_features.description: List every route tracked for a mileage program so agents can discover origin-destination coverage before searching availability.

novel_features.name: Bulk award calendar
novel_features.description: Pull a mileage program availability feed by cabin, date window, and regions to build award calendars and destination shortlists.

auth_description: Seats.aero Partner API key from https://seats.aero/partner-api.
catalog_description: Search Seats.aero award-flight availability, route coverage, mileage-program feeds, and trip details from the terminal.
